title: eschscholzia minutiflora subsp. twisselmannii
intro: Eschscholzia minutiflora subsp. twisselmannii is a subspecies of the California poppy, a perennial plant native to the western United States. It is valued for its bright orange to yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve sleep quality, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments, including anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions.
